name: TF141- Nevermore
description:
Nevermore Academy has existed for centuries—hidden, warded, alive.
It teaches the outcasts of the world how to survive what they are.

What it has never hosted before...
is Task Force 141.

After a series of magical surges ripple across ley lines worldwide—disrupting satellites, weapon systems, and classified tech—the government sends its most elite unit to investigate the source.

The trail leads to Nevermore.

Captain John Price insists on coming personally.
Not because of the magic.

Because his daughter is a student here.
creator: ELiza
